description: FM-05 variant (RPN=24): Multi-statement code where early statements (x = 10, y = 20) succeed before a NameError on `z = undefined_var`. Verifies that variables from BEFORE the error do NOT persist in self.locals (LocalREPL only updates locals on successful execution — the except block skips the locals update loop). Iteration 2: model defines the missing variable and completes successfully.

responses.note: Iteration 1: Multi-statement code. x=10, y=20 succeed. z=undefined_var raises NameError. Because exec() raises before locals update loop, x and y should NOT persist.

args.code:
x = 10
y = 20
z = undefined_var + 30
print(f"Result: {x + y + z}")

responses.note: Iteration 2: Model saw NameError. Re-defines all variables including the missing one. Prints result.

args.code:
x = 10
y = 20
undefined_var = 30
z = undefined_var + 30
print(f"Result: {x + y + z}")

responses.note: Final text response with FINAL() containing the computed result.

parts.text:
After fixing the NameError, the computation completed: x=10, y=20, z=60, total=90.

FINAL(Result: 90)

expected.final_answer:
After fixing the NameError, the computation completed: x=10, y=20, z=60, total=90.

FINAL(Result: 90)
